description_long: This is a compact wooden cabinet or shelf unit with a light natural wood finish, supported by black metal legs. The upper section features two open cubby shelves, each containing neatly folded white towels or cloths. On top of the unit, there is a decorative arrangement: a glossy brown Buddha statue sits to one side, while a white vase filled with pink and white artificial flowers is placed on the other. The lower section includes a flat surface that could serve as a small desk or display area, with a single white chair positioned in front. The back and sides are solid wood panels, giving the unit a sturdy and enclosed appearance. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in public spaces such as waiting areas, lobbies, or community centers.
description: A modern wooden cabinet or shelf with black metal legs, open cubbies with folded towels, a Buddha statue, and a flower vase on top, paired with a white chair.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden panels, the Buddha statue, and the flower vase on top, as well as the white chair and black metal legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open cubby shelves with folded towels, the Buddha statue and flower vase on top, and the white chair in front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the flower vase and Buddha statue, with a clear view of the chair and the side profile of the shelves.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid wooden back panel, with the tops of the Buddha statue and flower vase visible above the cabinet.
